---
layout: default
title: "Parliament Deadlocked Over NEET Row; Supreme Court Legal Rulings"
date: 2026-07-23T16:06:18.808426+00:00
summary: "Parliament faces a fourth day of adjournments due to intense clashes over the NEET paper leak, while the Supreme Court issues key rulings on judicial benefits"
run_time_ist: "9:36PM"
---

<article class="digest-post">
  <a class="back-link" href="{{ '/' | relative_url }}">Political Brief</a>
  <p class="post-meta">Gemini Summary: 9:36PM</p>


<h2 class="section-title">India National Politics</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Parliamentary deadlock:</strong> Both Houses of Parliament were adjourned for the fourth consecutive day as the Opposition and NDA engaged in heated protests and face-offs over the NEET paper leak, with the government accusing the Opposition of avoiding a formal debate.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiqwFBVV95cUxNNWNzeWQzS21ZMjU0dWg4dUhSczcyU3EydGlMN1FscjJGa1NyWW5xdklWRFNyRTVzOW5LaklEb2JqNUZldFNRRElUakxyRVMxWHZaX3M5bEcxbjZXZU5sZndFQ2M4clhoYXFQNVBTQ3lvVkxYVmo5ZmlPZnBmYXBIYlFqcVF0cFRRTmczeE84RWhwdW1Wcno4eDdldjYtbmhvNFJRMFRReHM2UjA?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I1</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I3</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I5</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiugFBVV95cUxQSmExdVpibHBZV1k1R1d3MnZ4YUFMbzBaWVdqOVJ2OXdfenBJNWNid1gzLVp1Rzk5Ykx6OG94TWd1OEpZZ0NmdWxONFduRU00XzRrZ0hXYWcxeFlrWWlyY2wzbkxEQVZ2QlFwLVRmbFdBRk9Wd0UwZmJaS0JfOTR1UmROdWxhUFZqUHBwRTFua3RSZURzX1NuZWhIX2pNWk5WaFlMY29uckszRWQ1QXNTNVZ6d1F2Y0Vvemc?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I15</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiuAFBVV95cUxNakZ4REN5R3F1VGhiVjNQRnhwczgyNmRWMjRramZWYTgxQW1RRGhHX0ZLaWJvWC1NSVhNU2J5bWF3Nzg3N0VyLTZFYnZWV0pEQS14all4cDMyekprc1RoWHh1YWFQZWRhRTgyTm5LSkZlUm41NFpwX2Q1d2g4dmphZWV5XzVIUG95U2poS19KODd5VGxhVXY1akR3R203eEk3djhabE1qZ05UeE85X0kwYWlPMk5oc0Nn0gG-AUFVX3lxTE9RX1VQbVJSZ1BZbXF0NmxkSnlLVDB5dzQwOVRsS01KUEZaVTlCVWdSaGJ5SjVRa0h3d21WN1ZCYjNxTmpWeEJ2QnE5TUFtWXROTERGMGlzdlJWbndDODI2bDByd1NPcWUxcUw5VU1vRl9OeDlidUEtb1EwX1RsN3hybGVPeXNEd3B0ejR5ak85ZGVLTGFaWFN6aGVkdldCVGthY1I3MzRwSGp5bnJPU0d3a0xDQWNhYlhVNHdIMHc?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I25</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I26</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>NEET debate standoff:</strong> The BJP has challenged the Opposition and Rahul Gandhi to a parliamentary debate on the NEET issue, while the Opposition continues to demand the resignation of the Education Minister.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I2</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiowFBVV95cUxPRUxRamRYSlNXYjY0M3hDWlNERWc0UzBrcHVSTTlHX0dCTk9YQ2t0NE1mX1k3Qkpfa3dPV010UGtnekd1NFQ1bmFCeW40VnhvSjhDc3hvSTgycElqVUpQOVhaWFVOekJfa0NSaV8wX2dkODRNNGk2em8tdXRMZ1FIZ1dkaUF5bGtpSmxZdmhucnRQRm9vSEk4RGdZV1BDRzVDUXBz?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I4</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I6</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I19</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I39</a></span></li>
</ul>

<h2 class="section-title">Policy and Institutions</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Supreme Court rulings:</strong> The Supreme Court ordered uniform post-retirement benefits for judges and set aside the bail of Sonam Raghuvanshi in the Meghalaya honeymoon murder case, while also advocating for amendments to the National Highways Act to remove bureaucratic control over land compensation.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W12</a> <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMitgFBVV95cUxQSUNOR3E1c1d4SVJBQkNqT3g3NmRZR092N1FWSWFGQ3VoQ0EzbDVGUG5QWndvNDAxVmFrSTd0Y1JkZVhwTng2R0pyZV9SckhrUF9PSVlxVm0wbWRVVlozaVBjOUVhcTVILV85SHZrSlliRmVKMmk0WmRET2F4V3VoRkNTWlF4VVlGT3RmY3BuMVpVT3dfNHQ0OEdBTFN4VVRhZTAzdnVTVEoyWWZTYzVlVHFfRjJQQQ?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W1</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Legislative agenda:</strong> Amid the ongoing NEET protests, the Lok Sabha is scheduled to discuss the Supreme Court Judges Amendment Bill, which seeks to address judicial administrative matters.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMi-?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W13</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">W12</a></span></li>
</ul>
